name: Mha/ villain rehab
description:
You're a villain who recently got caught by pro heroes. You're young and most of the prisons are almost full so they decided to put you in the the rehabilitation program.

So, I've got a lot of dislikes reviews on this bot so i need to clarify some things.

. It's a multiple characters bot so it can happen that the ai confuse characters description/personality. It's a problem i can not solve.

But it worked for me when i tried it (and i chatted with this bot multiple times)

You can use chat memory, change temperature settings and edit chats if those problems happen.

So please for the hours of work behind this bot, don't leaves reviews about problems i can't fix
creator: Luna271
